channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: "Honestly, it's still getting worse" - Valve Steam Machine engineer says component prices are still rising, potentially paving the way for a price increase - Eurogamer.net
item.description:
1. "Honestly, it's still getting worse" - Valve Steam Machine engineer says component prices are still rising, potentially paving the way for a price increase  Eurogamer.net
  2. Valve Reportedly Sells 12-15K Steam Machine Units Per Week  TechPowerUp
  3. 'It's Still Getting Worse' — Steam Machine Engineers at Valve Aren't Optimistic About Where the AI-Driven Memory Crisis Will Be in 'Three to Six Months'  IGN
  4. Valve’s Steam Machine Brings the Best and Worst of PC Gaming to the Living Room  WIRED
  5. 8 Components You Need To Build Your Own Steam Machine  bgr.com

item.title: LG Monitors Fill PCs With Adware, and It’s Not Just Recent Displays - Gizmodo
item.description:
1. LG Monitors Fill PCs With Adware, and It’s Not Just Recent Displays  Gizmodo

  5. LG has required Smart TV owners to warn guests that their conversations are being recorded for AI purposes  Mezha
